commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an internal code-mode namespace registry, a QuickJS namespace bridge, docs, live repro scripts, targeted tests, plugin rollback cleanup, and a small session-key normalization/test adjustment.

PR surface: Source +638, Tests +526, Docs +185, Other +738. Total +2087 across 13 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR defects: source inspection shows runExec calls createCodeModeNamespaceRuntime before prepareSource, and CLI dispatch still normalizes session keys before embedded execution. I did not run tests because this is a read-only review.
